speaker: MATT
raw_text: Right. Never mind, that's 66 points of damage. As you pull back and carefully aim, the arrow disappears and you watch as there's a flash of green energy, the arrow impacting on this creature, and the vines curl around. You hear a (roar) and the bushes explode as this entity steps out, tearing the vines off its body, throwing them to the ground as they shrivel and shake and then turn to dust and dissipate into the underbrush. As the creature steps out and looks directly at you, its six glowing eyes in a three by three pattern staring right at you, the arcing of the energy finishing throughout its body, it stands upright for a moment. Its hunched form goes almost more humanoid and it looks at you with an intelligence that you didn't expect. It takes a step, and another step, and seems to almost give you a nod of respect. Roll initiative. (cheering, laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As I do not have the actual mini for the creature this is working for, but this will give the idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, look at that thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, he's huge. Maybe this was a mistake. I should have talked to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I should have talked? No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm trying to Bramble Shot him.

preceding_turns.text: You've got this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, we'll put that there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (sings) Matt owns tiny trees!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And wait, before I did that, I get my broom ready, and then I'm going to do what I said.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you get your broom ever so carefully ready. You Hunter's Mark him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like that guy when he's unloading the shotgun in Jurassic Park?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, clever girl! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, is that what this is going to be?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hunter's Mark and you're taking your Bramble Shot. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I got 29.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 29. That hits. What's the saving throw on that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: DC 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is a 20. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He is not restrained, but he does take an additional 4d8 of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Which is right here. Ten, 15, 21 Bramble Shot damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thorns.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Ten, 11, 12, 13, 14. Was this a surprise attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So isn't that an automatic crit as an Assassin?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, because you're an Assassin, it is. So with all the dice involved there, that's 21 times two, that's 42.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Plus your arrow. What did you roll for the arrow?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Plus the what?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's the actual arrow damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Arrow damage was two, lightning damage was two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so that's eight, plus whatever your modifier is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: One for Hunter's Mark, and then I get a Sneak Attack on him, too. And then four for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice! That is 56 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Plus ten additional for the eight and the two for the bracers.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Go for it. I need you to roll a concentration check, by the way, for your Hunter's Mark. Because you took damage for each of those hits. You've got to remember that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And he falls to the ground and he hurts himself.

preceding_turns.text: And dies.

preceding_turns.text: He definitely plummets.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, a tree falls.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll say, for the purposes of this, sure. As he lands under the tree, the tree slams down, and as he hits the ground and slams, you can see the dirt has been displaced from impact. This creature is extremely heavy and dense, now seeing it right in front of your face, to the point where its tumbling impact pushed a tree over in the middle of the forest. That's the end of its turn. You're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.text: Two ones in a row.

preceding_turns.text: No, this is my go-to die. This is the fan-given die. I use this for everything.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to do something. This is all fucking concentration, so I can't do shit. I'm going to go up higher.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hope that I'm going out of his range.

preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, we'll say you're going 30 feet up from where you were. You're up in this direction there.

preceding_turns.text: Okay, and I'm going to shoot him. (laughs) I'm going to shoot him twice! 19?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 19 does hit, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! Okay, that's 16 plus two lightning damage, plus one for Hunter's Mark. But I do get Sneak Attack because Trinket's next to him, right? Well, I run Trinket up to him. How about that? I run Trinket up to him. So a six for the Sneak Attack.

preceding_turns.text: Six damage for Sneak Attack. Got it.
